mode: edit
description: Mark a task as complete in the phase tasks file and update progress
---

# Check Task - Progress Tracker

Mark tasks as complete in phase task files and update progress.

## Instructions

1. **Identify the current phase** from CURRENT_FOCUS.md or docs/PRODUCTION_ROADMAP.md
2. **Read the phase tasks file** (docs/phases/phaseN/PHASEN_TASKS.md)
3. **Find the task** by number (e.g., "1.3") or description
4. **Update the checkbox** from `[ ]` to `[x]`
5. **Update progress metrics** if present
6. **Report** what was marked complete and remaining tasks

## After Marking Complete

1. Check if all sub-tasks in a group are done — mark parent if so
2. Check if all tasks in the phase are done — suggest updating roadmap
